Functions and headers for cache management, FPU cleanup, interrupt handling, and privilege management on ARM MCUs.


## Files
- **[cache.h](cache.h.md)**: Functions for enabling, disabling, flushing, and invalidating instruction and data caches on Cortex-M7.
- **[fpu.h](fpu.h.md)**: Declares a function for cleaning up the MCU floating-point unit.
- **[interrupts.h](interrupts.h.md)**: Header file for managing MCU interrupt states and priorities, with ARM-specific implementations.
- **[interrupts_arm.inl.h](interrupts_arm.inl.h.md)**: Inline functions to check if the MCU is in an ISR and to get the ISR priority for ARM architecture.
- **[interrupts_stubs.inl.h](interrupts_stubs.inl.h.md)**: Inline functions for checking MCU interrupt state and getting ISR priority.
- **[privilege.h](privilege.h.md)**: Functions for managing and checking thread privilege states in a microcontroller environment.
- **[privilege_arm.inl.h](privilege_arm.inl.h.md)**: Functions for managing ARM microcontroller execution state and checking thread privilege level.
- **[privilege_stubs.inl.h](privilege_stubs.inl.h.md)**: Inline functions for checking and setting thread privilege state in the MCU.
